name: Canonical IDs (FrameworkCode + clauseRef + controlRef)
summary: Implementer publishes a Framework object whose registry key matches framework.code, whose clauses carry unique clauseRefs, and whose controls carry unique controlRefs.
requirements: framework.name, framework.version, framework.description and framework.referenceUrl are non-empty (referenceUrl is http or https).
framework.jurisdiction is a non-empty list of ISO-3166-alpha-2 codes or a recognised sentinel (GLOBAL, EU, EEA, UK).
Every clause has a non-empty clauseRef, title and description.
clauseRef values within a framework are unique.
Every control has a non-empty controlRef, title, description and category.
controlRef values within a framework are unique.
No fabricated trademark or copyright markers in framework metadata.
